component.name: Application Launcher (modern)
component.summary: A modern fullscreen application grid launcher for KDE Plasma

description.p: AppGrid is a modern fullscreen application grid launcher for KDE Plasma, inspired by macOS Launchpad. It provides a clean, visual way to browse and launch your applications.

ul.li: Fullscreen overlay grid with Wayland layer-shell support
Category-based filtering and KRunner search integration
Quick commands: terminal, shell, file browser (type ? for help)
Configurable icon size, grid dimensions, and sort order
Pin to Task Manager, Add to Desktop, Favorites, Hide apps
Session management (Sleep, Restart, Shut Down, Lock, Log Out)
Background blur, opacity, and corner radius customization
Alt+1 through Alt+9 shortcuts for instant search result launching
New app detection and most-used sorting
